title: Survival Pack
description: This resource pack adds many QoL tweaks, including textures changing based on durability, fishing rod bobbers being removed, and much more!
body:
# Survival (PvP) Pack by Unknown_303 ### Compatability Warning: **Some features in the default resource pack have proven to be incompatable with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium). I have released a Sodium compatable version, but if you find that something is not working, feel free to contact me at unknown.303yt@gmail.com** ### Note: **Even though I try to keep the features the same between versions, due to the way I make these packs it can be difficult to do so. If you find that a feature is missing in a new version, please let me know at unknown.303yt@gmail.com** This mod adds various QoL tweaks to Minecraft. For a full list, check the changelog.
Even though the versions say different things, in theory it can work all the way back to 1.16 and will definetly work for any versions that aren't snapshots. Ignore Minecraft.

## Credits:
Includes code from Default Dark Mode by nebulr. Find the original resource pack [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode).
